data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the counter lifecycle.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a counter lifecycle (open, paused, closed). However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or endpoints that confirm the existence or functionality of such a lifecycle. The linked use case mentions the need for a counter lifecycle, but there is no evidence demonstrating that this requirement is implemented or validated in the current saga lifecycle.
gaps: No evidence of a counter lifecycle (open, paused, closed) being validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the counter lifecycle.
